_notes.purpose: Claude Code project settings for this template. Read AGENTS.md first; specialist subagents live in .claude/agents, and domain skills live in .codex/skills.
hooks: SessionStart prints a one-screen orientation so every session begins aware of the canonical guide.
PreToolUse blocks edits to dist/ and vendored content.

hooks.command:
printf '
=== c3-oss/go-template ===
- Canonical guide: AGENTS.md (read it before substantial changes).
- Toolchain: devbox + just. No Makefile.
- Conventional Commits with required scope are enforced by commitlint.
- Local CI lane: `just ci`.
===

'

printf '
=== c3-oss/go-template ===
- Canonical guide: AGENTS.md (read it before substantial changes).
- Toolchain: devbox + just. No Makefile.
- Conventional Commits with required scope are enforced by commitlint.
- Local CI lane: `just ci`.
===

'
if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path"[^,]*"[^"]*/(dist|vendor)/'; then printf 'BLOCKED: dist/ and vendor/ are generated/vendored. Do not edit by hand.\n' >&2; exit 2; fi
